treeDensity.title: Tree Density
treeDensity.tooltip: Controls the amount of extra trees on Timber Hearth

grassDensity.title: Grass Density
grassDensity.tooltip: Controls the amount of extra grass tufts on Timber Hearth

cloudDensity.title: Cloud Density
cloudDensity.tooltip: Controls the amount of clouds around Timber Hearth

fireflyEnabled.title: Fireflies Visible
fireflyEnabled.tooltip: Controls the time frame when fireflies are visible

fireflyDensity.title: Firefly Density
fireflyDensity.tooltip: Controls the amount of firefly emitters on Timber Hearth

treeOcclusionOptimisation.title: Tree Occlusion Optimisation
treeOcclusionOptimisation.tooltip: When enabled trees which are hidden from the camera's view are disabled
